game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Mobile: Players engage in a first-person shooter experience across competitive multiplayer modes or Battle Royale, controlling a soldier via on-screen virtual joysticks and buttons for movement, aiming, and abilities. Matches are objective-based, earning players XP and currency for performance, which fuels progression through account and weapon leveling to unlock new gear and attachments.
game_info.description: Battle Royale FPS Arena: You are a soldier in a competitive arena match. Eliminate enemy soldiers to earn XP and unlock weapon upgrades. Survive waves of increasingly skilled opponents while collecting ammo and health packs. Reach level 5 to win the match! Watch your health and ammo carefully.
game_info.controls: Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward/strafe left/right | Space: Shoot weapon | Shift: Sprint (2x speed) | Z: Reload weapon | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
